M-023.NAME: handshake-anomaly-detector
M-023.owns: handshake observation, endpoint metadata persistence, and delegation to M-031 for roaming-vs-abuse decisions

exports.fn-observe-peer-handshake: Records last-seen handshake and endpoint data for a device-linked peer
exports.fn-apply-anti-abuse-decision: Persists anti-abuse audit events and invokes soft enforcement only for confirmed M-031 decisions

M-023.hotspot: H-009: Handshake anomaly detection must avoid false positives on mobile roaming; raw endpoint changes are no longer sufficient evidence.
